parameters.jsCode:
const p = $input.first().json;

// Check for existing record (dedup for cron)
const row = {
  project_id: p.project_id, persona_name: p.persona_name,
  segment: p.segment, niche: p.niche, city: p.city,
  niche_cluster: p.niche_cluster || '',
  priority_engines: p.priority_engines || 'both',
  priority_score: p.priority_score, qc_score: p.qc_score,
  ml_qc_score: p.ml_qc_score, qc_method: p.qc_method || 'rule-based',
  status: p.status, main_jtbd: (p.main_jtbd || '').substring(0, 500),
  total_queries: p.total_queries,
  hunt_ladder_levels: p.hunt_ladder_levels,
  rag_sources_used: p.rag_sources_used, rag_quality: p.rag_quality,
  groq_tokens: p.groq_tokens, model_used: p.model_used,
  latency_ms: p.latency_ms,
  uses_ai_search: p.uses_ai_search, has_commercial: p.has_commercial,
  prompt_version: p.prompt_version,
  raw_content_length: p.raw_content_length,
  attempt: p.attempt || 1,
  engine_tagged: p.engine_tagged || 0,
  engine_total: p.engine_total || 0,
  issues: p.issues ? JSON.stringify(p.issues) : null,
  persona_json: JSON.stringify(p.persona),
  dedup_key: p.deterministic_id,
  version: 'v4.0_pro',
  created_at: new Date().toISOString()
};
return [{ json: { row }}];

const p = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: {
  workflow: 'NN_00_v4.0_PRO',
  project_id: p.project_id,
  qc_score: p.qc_score,
  ml_qc_score: p.ml_qc_score,
  rule_qc_score: p.rule_qc_score,
  qc_method: p.qc_method,
  groq_tokens: p.groq_tokens,
  latency_ms: p.latency_ms,
  rag_sources: p.rag_sources_used,
  rag_quality: p.rag_quality,
  status: p.status,
  model: p.model_used,
  prompt_version: p.prompt_version,
  hunt_levels: p.hunt_ladder_levels,
  total_queries: p.total_queries,
  attempt: p.attempt,
  engine_tagged_pct: p.engine_total > 0 ? Math.round(p.engine_tagged / p.engine_total * 100) : 0,
  timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
}}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify(Object.assign({}, JSON.parse(JSON.stringify($("Prepare LLM Call").first().json.groq_payload)), { model: $("Prepare LLM Call").first().json.fallback_model })) }}
